conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 7 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

Column 1: OS Rate (%) | Overall | Treatment
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document provides median OS in months, but not a specific percentage of patients surviving at the latest follow-up time point for the overall treatment arm."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document provides median overall survival in months and Kaplan-Meier curves, but does not explicitly report the overall survival rate as a percentage at the latest follow-up for the treatment arm."
